'''pathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:sagittately|sagittately]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-th-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sagittately|sagittately]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pathate|pathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pathatesher|pathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathatesherĂ«m|pathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pathatero|pathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pathateshĂ«|pathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathateshĂ«m|pathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipathatero|gokipathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipathateshĂ«|gokipathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathateshĂ«m|gokipathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopathankerom|gopathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopathankeshĂ«|gopathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathankeshĂ«m|gopathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopathankeya|gopathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pathaterom|pathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathatemu|pathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pathateya|pathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipathaterom|gokipathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathatemu|gokipathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipathateya|gokipathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pathathate|pathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pathathatesher|pathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathathatesherĂ«m|pathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pathathatero|pathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pathathateshĂ«|pathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathathateshĂ«m|pathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipathathatero|gokipathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipathathateshĂ«|gokipathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathathateshĂ«m|gokipathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopathathankerom|gopathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopathathankeshĂ«|gopathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopathathankeshĂ«m|gopathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopathathankeya|gopathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pathathaterom|pathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pathathatemu|pathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pathathateya|pathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipathathaterom|gokipathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipathathatemu|gokipathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipathathateya|gokipathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠthĂŠte|pĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠthĂŠtesher|pĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠthĂŠtero|pĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠthĂŠtero|gokipĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠthĂŠterom|pĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠthĂŠtemu|pĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠthĂŠteya|pĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠthĂŠterom|gokipĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠthĂŠteya|gokipĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafthafte|pafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafthaftesher|pafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafthaftesherĂ«m|pafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafthaftero|pafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafthafteshĂ«|pafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafthafteshĂ«m|pafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafthaftero|gokipafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafthafteshĂ«|gokipafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafthafteshĂ«m|gokipafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafthafnkerom|gopafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafthafnkeshĂ«|gopafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafthafnkeshĂ«m|gopafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafthafnkeya|gopafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafthafterom|pafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafthaftemu|pafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafthafteya|pafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafthafterom|gokipafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafthaftemu|gokipafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafthafteya|gokipafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
